cells.rationale: Cross-cutting marker injection across three launch sites plus byte-pinned argv goldens is a subtle multi-file correctness surface.
Security-critical shell-command allowlist with a documented bypass corpus is a subtle security invariant.
Contract prose rewrite plus mechanical re-render and parity recapture is judgment-heavy but not opus-warranting.
Small producer-probe detection modeled on an existing sentinel precedent.
Bounded docs, glossary, and ADR write modeled on existing precedents.
